name: Causal Loop Diagram
description: Model variables and feedback loops with signed causal links
systemPromptHint: Node labels should be variable names that can increase or decrease (e.g. 'Sales Revenue', not 'Revenue goes up'). Identify reinforcing (R) and balancing (B) loops. A loop with an even number of negative edges is reinforcing; odd is balancing. Delayed links are critical for understanding oscillation.
